name: clichat
description: Join clichat rooms from VS Code. A small terminal-based chat that looks like a 404 page.

clichat.serverUrl.description: WebSocket URL of the clichat server (wss://... or ws://...). If empty, the CLI's own default is used (ws://127.0.0.1:8080).

clichat.defaultRoom.description: Pre-filled room number when running 'clichat: Join a room'. Leave empty to be asked every time.

clichat.defaultName.description: Display name. If empty, the CLI uses your system username.

clichat.cliPath.description: Path to the clichat CLI binary. Default 'clichat' assumes it's on $PATH (via 'npm link' in the project).

clichat.serverCliPath.description: Path to the clichat-server CLI binary. Default 'clichat-server' assumes it's on $PATH.
